Alright, so the long style meal plans and example would be the 42DT detox, but not exhaustive as in there are other plays that this would account for, but since most of you are going to be running that first, the 42DT detox would be an example of that. But like I said, there are other ones that would fall into this category that are not single page meal plans. Okay, so first thing, again you're going to contract double check. Second, they're going to hop on the scale again. You'll record their weight. Note that you're not recording it on their meal plan because you have not given it to them yet. After that, you'll measure their body fat and you're going to put it on your clipboard, but you're not going to put it on anything else. So they've walked in, double checked, got on the scale, recorded on your clipboard, measure their body fat, recorded on your clipboard, your clipboard. Got them downloaded the app, which is the tech portion. Friend on Facebook, first like and check in. And then the difference here is that at this point you would then send them to create an online profile. All right, so this is where you will, like having a whiteboard helps a lot because then you can just have the link behind you and say, hey, click that link. We're having a redirect of, you know, from whatever website, you know, you can buy like 123fitness.com and then just go into GoDaddy and put redirect and then put whatever link you want. Typically, that's what the secret URL link within ClickFunnels is where they would be able to go and create their own login and email. You can choose to do this at the end of the day. I would not recommend that because I think it'll be a pain, but you can do it either way. If it were me, I would just send them like make it, make it right there on the spot so you don't have to do it again later. After that, make sure they log in and then go to the nutrition section and download the PDF that is according to which plan they should be following. So that way they know, you'll know which plan they should have and they'll be acquainted with the online portal and it'll be on their phone so that that way they now have virtual access and they will have the meal plan on their phone. And so that way it just looks really sweet and they'll have it with them wherever they go. So that concludes the step one of the nutrition day, weigh in day orientation.
